text: Welcome to Sunshine English.
Meet my assistant.
She is Zara.
She is my everything.
You know, you used to play together.
Hello, sir. Would you like to drink
something?
No thanks.
I am fine.
Jane, you don't need to sign that
contract. I am ready to marry you. We
can marry soon. Let's go. We will talk
to my grandpa.
Really?
Thanks, my love. I am going to grab my
purse. I love you so much. I cannot wait
to marry you.
Bravo, Zara. You played well with my
feelings. You are very clever. You
betrayed me. You knew I was Jane's
fianceé. You knew everything. You did
not tell me anything. Were you playing
with my feelings?
No, Tony. No, I was not playing with
your feelings. It's over now. I cannot
hide myself. I just hid my reality. I
know we cannot be together. You were my
childhood crush. I am so sorry.
You should have told me about you. I
asked you so many times. You hurt me a
lot. Do you really love? I think you
were just using me.
This is not true. I was not playing with
your feelings.
I am done. I know you will not marry me.
Jane is my boss. I cannot betray her.
She is crazy for you. I am so sorry
again. I am just a maid.
No way. It's not over between us. I was
serious. You are very special for me.
You hurt me a lot, Zara.
Yes, Mom.
I am super excited. Tony wants to marry
me soon. I will wear my engagement ring
soon. I am so happy. I am going to meet
Tony's grandpa.
I am walking on air. Mom,
I will go with you. I will not let you
go there alone. Let's go.
They are coming here. We will talk about
it later.
I am ready. Let's go.
Okay, Zara will go with us. Can she go
with us?
She is just a maid of this house. Why
would she go with us?
Mom,
she will go with us.
Fine, let's go.
I am so sorry. I know I made a mistake.
Tony and I reconciled.
We are together now. We want to marry
each other. We love each other.
I am glad you realized your mistake.
Please have a seat. I forgive you.
Who is that girl?
Yes. Who is she? She is so pretty. Her
eyes are gorgeous.
She is Zara.
She is my maid. She works for me.
Please have a seat. We need to talk. I
am glad you two are together now.
Grandpa, I want to marry Jane. I will
marry her next week.
What?
next week. No way. We need some time. We
are not ready yet. I have to buy a lot
of things for my daughter. She needs a
bridal dress as well. We need some time.
We will handle everything. One week is
enough. I want a simple wedding. Jane,
can you marry me next week?
Yes,
I am ready. We will marry next week.
Tony, are you sure? I have to book a
hotel for your wedding ceremony.
There are a lot of things to do.
As I said earlier, I want a simple
wedding. I will handle everything.
No, my son.
What are you doing here? You need to
rest.
No, my son. I am fine. Please don't
marry this girl. She is a bad girl. She
is not good for you. I will not let you
do this. I am your mom.
Mom, we will marry next week. Please
don't do this. You will like Jane.
I love you a lot my son. Please don't
marry her. I don't want to lose you. You
are my world. Will you leave me just
like your dad?
Mom, I will not leave you.
My daughter loves Tony a lot. I love my
daughter a lot. You cannot say a single
word about Jane.
If she wants to marry my son, she has to
listen to me.
She will stay here in this house after
marriage.
Mom, I will take you to your room. Let's
go.
Okay, my son. That girl will come with
us. She is very beautiful.
Hey girl, come with us.
Zara,
you can go with them.
Mom, are you okay now? Please don't be
angry.
I am okay my son. You can marry Jane but
she has to stay here after marriage. I
want to see you daily. Will you listen
to me?
Okay mom, I will listen to you. Have
some rest.
My mom liked you. I will not forgive
you. You hid your reality from me. Why
did you do this? I loved you a lot. What
did you want to do? What was your plan?
Am I a toy for you?
I was also sincere with you. It was not
a joke. I am a maid. You wanted to stay
with me as well as you wanted to marry
Jane. Why is that? I don't need this
relationship.
You are going to marry soon.
It's over now. Jane is my boss. I cannot
betray her. Please forget me. I know you
cannot accept me. You don't have guts.
Can you break your engagement?
I am not a weak boy. I can tell my
family about us. I love you. You just
used me. It's not over between us.
Please don't do this. Jane will die
without you. She is crazy for you. I
don't want to hurt her. Let's go
downstairs now. I am sorry again. I did
not want to hurt anyone.
You are just mine. You changed me.
I think we should go now.
Have a good day everyone.
Jane, what happened? You should be
happy. You are going to marry soon. Are
you okay?
Why did you go with me? Everyone liked
you. Tony's mom liked you. Ava liked
your eyes. You don't have beautiful
eyes.
I am prettier than you. I am your boss.
You are just a maid here.
Don't go there again with me.
Okay, I got it. I am sorry.
I cannot forget you, Zara. You are my
love. You should have told me about your
reality.
Tony, what are you thinking? Are you
okay?
I am okay. I am just a little tired.
You told me about your love. Who is she?
You wanted to tell Jane about it. You
want to marry Jane? I am confused. What
happened?
I was just kidding. Jane and I will
marry next week. Jane loves me a lot.
She has been waiting for me. I am happy.
Okay, Tony, have some rest. Take care.
Boss, let's go home now. You are not
okay. You drank beer a lot. Why are you
sad? What happened? Is everything okay?
I am fine. Just leave me alone. You are
my driver. You can go home now. I will
come home soon.
No, boss. No. I cannot leave you alone
like this. I will drive.
Okay. Let's go to Jane's house. I want
to meet someone.
Boss, what are we doing here? We can
come here tomorrow.
What's going on here? Tony sir,
I am sorry. I know we should not come
here this time. We are just going.
Please Tony sir, go home. Jane, madam is
sleeping right now. Everyone is
sleeping. You can come here tomorrow.
I will be right back. I forgot to park
my car.
I want to meet Zora. Go and call Zora. I
have to meet her right now.
What? Why do you want to meet Zara?
Just go and call her. I will not go from
here. Where is Zara?
Okay, Tony. Sir, calm down. I will call
her.
Kora, what are you doing here?
Are you okay?
I am okay. Tony sir came here. He is
drunk. He wants to meet you right now.
Please come with me.
What? Why does he want to meet me? Oh
god. Did someone see him?
No. Everyone is sleeping. He came here
with his driver. Please talk to him. I
don't want any trouble.
Okay, don't worry. I will talk to him.
I will wait for you in the living room.
If someone gets up, I will let you know.
Okay. Thanks,
Tony.
Why did you come here? Please go home.
Someone can see us here.
I wanted to meet you. I missed you a
lot, Zara. I could not forget you. You
hurt me a lot. Why did you hide your
reality from me?
I am so sorry. I did not play with you.
I also like you, but you are not mine.
Jane is crazy for you. I am just a maid
here. You are going to marry Jane soon.
Please don't hurt yourself.
I want to forget you, but it is
impossible.
What should I do now? I cannot love
Jane. I love you a lot.
Tony,
I want to see you happy. We can talk
later.
Please go home now. You are not in your
senses.
Please go now.
No, Zara. No.
I don't want to go home. Please marry
me.
What are you doing here, Kora?
Madam, do you need anything?
Don't beat around the bush.
What are you hiding? Who is in the yard?
Tony sir came here. He is in the yard
with Sara. They are talking. I am sorry.
I don't want to disturb you.
What? What is he doing here? You should
have told me about it. I need to talk to
him.
I can do anything for you. I know you
love me as well. Did you miss me?
What's going on here?
Madam Tony came here to meet Jane. Jane
is sleeping right now.
This is our family matter. What do you
think of yourself? I will talk to Tony.
You are just a maid in this house.
I am sorry. It will not happen again.
Shame on you, Tony. I was not expecting
this from you. You should go home. You
cannot meet my daughter right now. Just
look at you. You cannot even stand
properly.
I am sorry. I tried to stop Tony. Sir,
we are leaving.
Okay, I am going. I am sorry. I did not
want to disturb anyone. This is my
aunt's house.
Go to your bedroom. Zara
Jane, your breakfast is ready.
I will have my breakfast later. I will
meet Tony today. Go and iron my dress. I
want to look good in front of him.
Okay, Jane. I want to tell you
something. Tony Cir came here last
night. He was drunk.
What? Oh my god. Did he come here to
meet me? I know he cannot live without
me. I know him very well. He is my love.
Jane loves Tony a lot. She is crazy for
him. I cannot hurt Jane. I am sorry,
Tony.
You have to forget me. I don't want to
hurt anyone. I will not make more
mistakes again.
Zara,
what are you thinking?
Go and iron my dress. I don't have time.
Okay,
I will be right back.
Oh no, my cousin must be waiting for me.
I have to pick him up.
My parents are coming soon in this city
from village. I told you about a boy. He
saw your photo. He likes you. He will
also come here with his mother.
I have told my decision aunt. I will not
marry him. I don't want to marry right
now. Please don't force me.
Are you crazy? You should be happy. That
man is good-looking. He has his own car.
Will you work here for the rest of your
life? Jane will marry soon. What will
you do after her?
Why are you forcing me? Jane will take
care of me. I will stay with her after
her marriage. You know she cannot live
without me.
I was not born yesterday. These are just
excuses. Are you hiding something from
me? Are you waiting for a prince? You
are a maid here. Don't forget it.
Hello Tony. Long time no see. How have
you been?
I have been good. I missed you a lot, my
cousin. Everyone is waiting for you. You
came back after 5 years. You are looking
handsome.
I missed you too. Let's go home. I want
to meet Jane. I will tease her a lot. I
heard you are going to marry soon. Thank
god I came here on time.
Okay, let's go.
Oh my son, I missed you a lot. You look
good. How are you?
I am fine, Mom. I missed you, too. I am
good. How is everyone?
We are also fine. I am so happy to see
you here, my son.
How are you, Grandpa? You look healthy.
I am good. Let's go inside. You must be
tired.
Hello, my dear cousin. Thank God you
came.
I am going to marry soon.
Yes, I heard it. Congratulations. I will
tease you a lot.
Oh, really?
I will find a girl for you. My Tony is
handsome. He loves me a lot.
What's going on there? Who is outside?
Max came back after 5 years. He was very
naughty.
Zara, Max is a rich boy. He is a member
of thus family. You have to trap him.
You can change your life. You know him
very well. He knows you. What do you
think?
No way, aunt. He is my boss. What are
you saying?
Hello Zara, you are looking pretty. I
missed a lot as well. Thanks for asking.
I am good. Welcome back Sir Max. Please
have a seat.
Don't mind Zara. You know him. He is
very naughty.
I will make your black coffee. Please
have a seat.
I will also have a cup of coffee.
I love this coffee. What are you going
to do today?
I did not like this coffee.
We are going to have lunch outside.
Do you want to go with us?
Yes, sure. Let's go. Zara, why don't you
come with us?
No, thanks. I am fine.
Jane, can Zara come with us? She is your
assistant. Please let her come.
I am not stopping her. Fine, she will go
as well. Zara, go and bring my purse
from my room. I need to talk to my mom.
I will be right back.
What do you want to say, Mom? Why did
you call me?
You need to talk to Tony. Will you stay
with his mom after marriage? You cannot
stay in that house. Tony's mom is a
crazy lady. You need a separate house.
It is not a big deal, Mom. I will talk
to him later. Of course, I am not going
to stay in that house. A lot of single
women live there. I cannot tolerate his
crazy mom.
You should talk to him today. That's it.
Tony, I like Zar a lot. She is so
pretty. I will spend time with her.
Don't do this, Max. She is a good girl.
You cannot play with her.
Why are you worried? I like her. She is
a poor girl. She will be so happy.
You're going to marry Jane soon. You
don't need to think about it.
Girls are coming. Please don't think
about her. Zara is innocent.
I am ready. Let's go, everyone.
I loved this place. The day is windy
today. What would you like to have?
Zara, what do you want to eat?
Thanks. I am not hungry.
Tony,
I want to say something.
I will not stay with your mom after
marriage. We will live in a separate
house. I know you have your own
farmhouse.
We will live there.
Jane, you know my mom's health. I cannot
leave my mom. I came here after 20
years. My mom needs me. We will stay
there after marriage. I am sorry.
Bro, you should talk to her. You know
her anger.
Jane, listen to me. We need to talk.
Jane, what was that? You know my mom's
health. What is the big deal? That house
is huge.
No way. A lot of single women live
there. Your mom is crazy.
She does not like me. How can I live
there? No. No. My mom will not accept
this.
I don't want to live with your family.
Guys, calm down. Are you kids? Let me
talk to her.
Okay, Max, please talk to her. She does
not listen to me.
How is Jane? Is she fine?
Yes, she is fine. You should stay away
from Max. I know he is interested in
you. Do you want to trap him?
What are you saying, Tony? Don't say
like this. I am not a bad girl. I love
you. I did not play with you. Jane is
very important for me. I want to see her
happy.
You hurt me a lot. I still love you. I
cannot forget you, Zara.
Jane dear, I have a plan. You know Tony
loves his mother a lot. You have to stay
there. But on one condition, Tony has to
buy a new house for you. He is richer
than you. What do you mean? I am not a
greedy girl. I just want peace in my
life. His mom does not like me.
It is a golden opportunity for you. You
can get a new house. You just have to
stay here for a few weeks. Tony's mom
will be fine soon.
Fine.
Let's go back.
I will talk to Tony.
Tony,
I will stay with your mom after
marriage. But you have to buy a new
house for me. This is my condition.
Okay. My mom will be fine soon. My
family loves you a lot. I found a best
doctor for my mother.
Fine,
let's go back.
I am not hungry anymore.
I have to do a lot of things. Let's go,
Zara.
